hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普的最后期限越来越近，但没有任何外交突破的迹象；【CRYPTO】随着伊朗战争、人工智能重塑市场动态，比特币远离软件股。

items.title: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.summary: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
items.title_zh: Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.summary_zh: Visa 的新工具是主要银行和金融机构将人工智能融入其业务的更大努力的一部分。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump’s Deadline Draws Closer With No Sign of Diplomatic Breakthrough
items.summary: Israel and Iran traded fresh attacks on Tuesday after President Trump said a cease-fire proposal was “not good enough.” Mr. Trump has threatened to destroy Iran’s bridges and power plants if it does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz by 8 p.m. Eastern.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普的最后期限越来越近，但没有任何外交突破的迹象
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普总统表示停火提议“不够好”后，以色列和伊朗周二进行了新的攻击。特朗普威胁称，如果伊朗不在晚上 8 点之前重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，他将摧毁伊朗的桥梁和发电厂。东。

items.title: Bitcoin pulls away from software stocks as Iran war, AI reshape market dynamic
items.summary: BTC correlation with an ETF tracking software comany stocks broke sharply from near-total alignment to near zero after the conflict started.
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗战争、人工智能重塑市场动态，比特币远离软件股
items.summary_zh: 冲突开始后，BTC 与 ETF 跟踪软件公司股票的相关性从接近完全一致急剧下降至接近零。

items.title: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit highest level since February
items.summary: Spot bitcoin ETFs pulled in $471 million on April 6, the 6th-largest inflow of 2026, as prediction markets price little near-term Fed movement.
items.title_zh: 比特币 ETF 流入量创 2 月份以来最高水平
items.summary_zh: 4 月 6 日，现货比特币 ETF 资金流入 4.71 亿美元，为 2026 年第六大资金流入，因为预测市场对美联储近期走势影响不大。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
items.summary: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
items.summary_zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

items.title: Australia's most-decorated living soldier charged over alleged war crimes
items.summary: Ben Roberts-Smith, who denies all wrongdoing, previously lost a landmark defamation case over the alleged murders.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚获奖最多的在世士兵因涉嫌战争罪被指控
items.summary_zh: 本·罗伯茨-史密斯否认有任何不当行为，此前他曾因涉嫌谋杀而败诉了一起具有里程碑意义的诽谤案。

items.title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
items.summary: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 另类华尔街研究公司表示，已派出一名分析师前往霍尔木兹海峡。这是他们学到的
items.summary_zh: 在美国和以色列对伊朗发动战争之前，世界上大约 20% 的石油是通过狭窄的霍尔木兹海峡运输的。

items.title: Bitcoin briefly touches $70,000 as ETF inflows signal institutional interest
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for April 7, 2026
items.title_zh: ETF 流入表明机构兴趣，比特币短暂触及 70,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 4 月 7 日天气预报

items.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana hold steady as Trump sets Tuesday night deadline for Iran deal
items.summary: Oil jumped above $112 on threats to destroy Iranian infrastructure if no agreement is reached by midnight, while crypto markets gave back Monday's ceasefire rally gains.
items.title_zh: 特朗普设定周二晚伊朗协议最后期限，比特币、以太币、solana 保持稳定
items.summary_zh: 如果午夜之前未能达成协议，石油价格跃升至 112 美元上方，而加密货币市场则回吐了周一停火反弹的涨幅。

items.title: Bitcoin drops toward $68,000 as demand weakens and whales sell
items.summary: Glassnode data shows soft participation, while a negative gamma setup below $68,000 leaves BTC exposed to a faster move toward $60,000.
items.title_zh: 随着需求减弱和鲸鱼抛售，比特币跌向 68,000 美元
items.summary_zh: Glassnode 数据显示参与程度较低，而低于 68,000 美元的负伽玛设置使 BTC 面临更快向 60,000 美元移动的风险。

items.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs report largest single-day inflow in six weeks, worth $471 million
items.summary: The return in inflows reflects renewed confidence among institutional participants in the crypto market, analysts said.
items.title_zh: 现货比特币 ETF 录得六周来最大单日资金流入，价值 4.71 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，资金流入的回归反映了机构参与者对加密货币市场的新信心。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
items.title_zh: 通过鱼类监测的计算机视觉增强公民科学
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院海洋格兰特与伍德韦尔气候研究中心和其他合作者合作，展示了一种基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统。

items.title: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
items.summary: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."
items.title_zh: 在要求水平过高后，Blue Owl 将私人信贷基金赎回上限限制在 5%
items.summary_zh: Blue Owl 将高于平常的请求归因于“市场对人工智能相关软件公司中断的担忧加剧”。

items.title: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
items.summary: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特称伊朗炸弹将使核灾难更难以避免
items.summary_zh: 这位伯克希尔哈撒韦公司董事长表示，越来越多的核武器国家从根本上改变了全球风险格局。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he's still making calls on investments at Berkshire, flags 'tiny' new buy
items.summary: The 95-year-old investor said he still comes into the office daily and stays engaged with markets.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他仍在呼吁伯克希尔的投资，并表示“小规模”新收购
items.summary_zh: 这位 95 岁的投资者表示，他仍然每天来到办公室并与市场保持联系。

items.title: Warren Buffett teams up with NBA superstar Stephen Curry for charity lunch, reviving iconic auction
items.summary: The winning bidder — along with up to seven guests — will join Buffett and the Currys for an exclusive lunch in Omaha, Nebraska.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特与 NBA 巨星斯蒂芬·库里合作举办慈善午餐，复兴标志性拍卖
items.summary_zh: 中标者以及最多七位客人将在内布拉斯加州奥马哈与巴菲特和库里家族一起享用独家午餐。

items.title: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
items.summary: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.
items.title_zh: 三大利基商品价格大幅上涨。它们显示了中国对供应链的控制
items.summary_zh: 伊朗战争后，用于国防的关键元件和推动人工智能进步的半导体的价格飙升。

items.title: Why Hungary’s Election Could Swing on Roma Votes
items.summary: Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s policies affecting the Roma minority have put those voters in play in upcoming parliamentary elections. In a tight race, they could make the difference.
items.title_zh: 为什么匈牙利选举可能会因罗姆人的选票而左右摇摆
items.summary_zh: 总理维克托·欧尔班影响罗姆少数民族的政策使这些选民在即将举行的议会选举中发挥作用。在一场激烈的比赛中，他们可以发挥重要作用。

items.title: Vance Visits Hungary to Boost Orban Before Election
items.summary: The trip by the American vice president, JD Vance, makes clear that Russia is not the only country invested in a victory for Hungary’s leader, Viktor Orban.
items.title_zh: 万斯访问匈牙利在选举前提振欧尔班
items.summary_zh: 美国副总统万斯的此行清楚地表明，俄罗斯并不是唯一一个为匈牙利领导人维克托·欧尔班的胜利而投资的国家。

items.title: On Iran, Trump Keeps World Off Balance With Ever-Changing Threats
items.summary: Global leaders are struggling in their efforts to find a way to end the American-Israeli war on Iran, and they are spooked about what President Trump might do next.
items.title_zh: 在伊朗问题上，特朗普以不断变化的威胁让世界失去平衡
items.summary_zh: 全球领导人正在努力寻找结束美以对伊朗战争的方法，他们对特朗普总统下一步可能采取的行动感到恐惧。

items.title: A Hidden Russian Hand in Hungary’s Election? Actually, It’s Quite Open.
items.summary: Prime Minister Viktor Orban has made hostility to Ukraine a centerpiece of his campaign. Moscow seems determined to repay the favor.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利选举中隐藏的俄罗斯势力？事实上，它非常开放。
items.summary_zh: 总理维克托·欧尔班将对乌克兰的敌意作为其竞选活动的核心内容。莫斯科似乎决心报答这一恩惠。

items.title: Why Trees Are Key to Russia’s Spring Offensive in Ukraine
items.summary: In the age of drone warfare, Russia is expected to exploit the return of vegetation to help conceal its troops.
items.title_zh: 为什么树木是俄罗斯在乌克兰春季攻势的关键
items.summary_zh: 在无人机战争时代，俄罗斯有望利用植被的恢复来帮助隐藏其军队。

items.title: Bitcoin miners face a new rival for cheap power as Anthropic signs multi-gigawatt compute deal
items.summary: The AI company's partnership with Google and Broadcom for next-generation TPU capacity starting in 2027 adds to a wave of demand reshaping the economics of every industry that competes for cheap electricity, including bitcoin mining.
items.title_zh: 随着 Anthropic 签署数千兆瓦计算协议，比特币矿工面临廉价电力的新竞争对手
items.summary_zh: 这家人工智能公司与谷歌和博通从 2027 年开始合作开发下一代 TPU 产能，这将增加一波需求浪潮，重塑每个争夺廉价电力的行业的经济，包括比特币挖矿。

items.title: Bernstein sees over 100% upside for Figure as monthly loan volume tops $1 billion for first time
items.summary: Bernstein reiterated a $67 price target on Figure as March loan volume topped $1 billion for the first time.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 预计图的上涨空间将超过 100%，每月贷款额首次突破 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Bernstein 重申了 Figure 67 美元的目标价，因为 3 月份贷款量首次突破 10 亿美元。

items.title: Solana Foundation launches STRIDE program to fortify ecosystem security
items.summary: Solana Foundation launched new security initiatives with Asymmetric Research that are offered to the entire ecosystem.

items.summary_zh: Solana 基金会与非对称研究合作推出了新的安全计划，并提供给整个生态系统。

items.summary_zh: 总统否认有不当行为，但他仍然是 LIBRA 联邦调查的关注对象。

items.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN
items.summary: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN 是为了加速围绕人工智能的全球对话并支持独立媒体，扩大与建筑商、企业和更广泛的技术社区的对话。

items.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
items.summary: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.
items.title_zh: Gradient Labs 为每一位银行客户提供人工智能客户经理
items.summary_zh: Gradient Labs 使用 GPT-4.1 和 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 为 AI 代理提供支持，以低延迟和高可靠性自动化银行支持工作流程。

items.title: Liberate your OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 解放你的 OpenClaw

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可以测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
items.title_zh: 人工智能系统学习保持仓库机器人交通平稳运行
items.summary_zh: 这种新方法可以随时决定哪些机器人应该获得通行权，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量。

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
items.title_zh: 腕带使佩戴者能够通过自己的动作控制机械手
items.summary_zh: 通过移动他们的手和手指，用户可以指挥机器人弹钢琴或投篮球，或者他们可以操纵虚拟环境中的物体。

items.title: New Revelations Reignite Crypto Scandal Involving Argentina’s President Milei
items.summary: Court documents raise questions about the Argentine president’s statements that he had no connection to the launch of the $Libra cryptocurrency.
items.title_zh: 新的披露重新引发了涉及阿根廷总统米莱的加密货币丑闻
items.summary_zh: 法庭文件对阿根廷总统关于他与 $Libra 加密货币的推出没有任何关系的声明提出了质疑。

items.title: Why Michael Saylor's bitcoin buys aren’t moving the needle anymore
items.summary: Despite billions in purchases, MSTR demand is being outweighed by long term holder positioning and broader capital flows.
items.title_zh: 为什么迈克尔·塞勒（Michael Saylor）的比特币购买不再起到推动作用
items.summary_zh: 尽管购买量达数十亿美元，但长期持有者的定位和更广泛的资本流动超过了 MSTR 的需求。

items.title: Bitcoin price-drop speculation spurred by familiar price pattern
items.summary: BTC and ETH remain stuck in a two-month range as oil prices and Iran tensions weigh on sentiment, while AI and privacy tokens show surprising relative strength.
items.title_zh: 熟悉的价格模式引发了比特币价格下跌的猜测
items.summary_zh: 由于油价和伊朗紧张局势打压市场情绪，比特币和以太币仍停留在两个月区间内，而人工智能和隐私代币则显示出令人惊讶的相对强势。

items.title: Bitcoin whale moves over $20 million worth of BTC to Binance
items.summary: Between January and March 2025, the wallet accumulated 513 BTC, worth $50 million at the time, according to Arkham data.
items.title_zh: 比特币鲸鱼将价值超过 2000 万美元的 BTC 转移到币安
items.summary_zh: 根据 Arkham 的数据，2025 年 1 月至 3 月期间，该钱包积累了 513 BTC，当时价值 5000 万美元。

items.title: Polygon to activate Giugliano hardfork this week for faster finality
items.summary: The Giugliano upgrade is expected to occur on April 8 to improve finality and add fee parameters directly in block headers, the team said.
items.title_zh: Polygon 本周将激活 Giugliano 硬分叉以加快最终确定速度
items.summary_zh: 该团队表示，Giugliano 升级预计将于 4 月 8 日进行，以提高最终确定性并直接在区块头中添加费用参数。

items.title: SEC crypto safe harbor heads to White House review, proposal due ‘shortly’ says Atkins
items.summary: A proposed safe harbor framework to allow crypto projects to launch without needing to register right away is now in the White House's hands.
items.title_zh: 阿特金斯表示，美国证券交易委员会加密安全港即将接受白宫审查，提案“很快”到期
items.summary_zh: 一项拟议的安全港框架现已掌握在白宫手中，该框架允许加密项目无需立即注册即可启动。

items.title: Announcing the OpenAI Safety Fellowship
items.summary: A pilot program to support independent safety and alignment research and develop the next generation of talent
items.title_zh: 宣布 OpenAI 安全奖学金
items.summary_zh: 支持独立安全和对准研究并培养下一代人才的试点计划

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.title_zh: 深入了解我们的模型规格方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的模型规范如何作为模型行为的公共框架，随着人工智能系统的进步，平衡安全性、用户自由和责任。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 安全漏洞赏金计划简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出安全漏洞赏金计划，以识别人工智能滥用和安全风险，包括代理漏洞、提示注入和数据泄露。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙在年度信中提到了地缘政治、人工智能和私募市场的风险
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 在致股东的年度信中提到了美国成立 250 周年，并呼吁对美国理想做出广泛的重新承诺。

items.title: Huawei's cloud computing revenue dropped in 2025 as Chinese AI lagged U.S. rivals
items.summary: When including internal customers, the telecommunications giant said cloud computing revenue grew from a year ago.
items.title_zh: 中国AI落后美国竞争对手，华为2025年云计算收入下降
items.summary_zh: 当包括内部客户时，这家电信巨头表示云计算收入较一年前有所增长。

items.title: JD Vance arrives in Hungary to back Orbán's re-election bid
items.summary: The US vice-president's visit is the latest show of White House support for the Hungarian leader.
items.title_zh: JD万斯抵达匈牙利支持欧尔班竞选连任
items.summary_zh: 美国副总统的访问是白宫对匈牙利领导人支持的最新表现。

items.title: Music giant Universal gets $64bn takeover offer
items.summary: The music giant behind acts such as Taylor Swift and Sabrina Carpenter gets an offer from Bill Ackman's Pershing Square.
items.title_zh: 音乐巨头环球公司收到 640 亿美元的收购要约
items.summary_zh: 泰勒·斯威夫特 (Taylor Swift) 和萨布丽娜·卡彭特 (Sabrina Carpenter) 等艺人背后的音乐巨头收到了比尔·阿克曼 (Bill Ackman) 的潘兴广场 (Pershing Square) 的邀请。

items.title: One dead as train travelling 99mph collides with lorry in France
items.summary: The lorry driver is in custody after the train driver died during the collision in north-western France.
items.title_zh: 法国火车时速99英里与卡车相撞，造成一人死亡
items.summary_zh: 火车司机在法国西北部的碰撞事故中死亡，卡车司机已被拘留。

items.title: Taiwan opposition leader visits China for expected meeting with Xi Jinping
items.summary: Cheng Li-wun said she "gladly accepted" Xi Jinping's invitation and hopes to be a "bridge for peace".
items.title_zh: 台湾反对党领袖访华 预计与习近平会面
items.summary_zh: 郑丽媛表示，她“很高兴接受”习近平的邀请，希望成为“和平的桥梁”。

items.title: Rapper Offset shot in Florida - reports
items.summary: Reports suggest the former Migos rapper is in a "stable" condition.
items.title_zh: 说唱歌手 Offset 在佛罗里达州拍摄 - 报道
items.summary_zh: 有报道称，这位前 Migos 说唱歌手目前状况“稳定”。

items.title: Nine policemen sentenced to death in India over Covid custody killings
items.summary: The father and son died in jail after being arrested on suspicion of breaching Covid lockdown rules in 2020.
items.title_zh: 印度九名警察因新冠肺炎谋杀罪被判处死刑
items.summary_zh: 这对父子因涉嫌违反 2020 年新冠疫情封锁规定而被捕，随后在监狱中死亡。

items.title: Lil Nas X assault case to be dismissed if he completes mental health programme
items.summary: The judge said the musician's behaviour when he was arrested in LA last year was "aberrant from his normal conduct".
items.title_zh: 如果 Lil Nas X 完成心理健康计划，袭击案将被驳回
items.summary_zh: 法官表示，这位音乐家去年在洛杉矶被捕时的行为“有悖于他的正常行为”。

items.title: Ten killed in Israeli strikes and clashes between Hamas and militia in Gaza, local sources say
items.summary: The Israeli strikes reportedly targeted Hamas security personnel after they clashed with an Israeli-backed militia near Maghazi camp.
items.title_zh: 当地消息人士称，以色列袭击以及哈马斯和加沙民兵之间的冲突造成十人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据报道，以色列袭击目标是哈马斯安全人员，此前他们与马加齐营地附近以色列支持的民兵发生冲突。

items.title: Seven Eritrean players fail to return home after international match
items.summary: Several footballers have absconded in the past leaving behind what rights groups call a repressive government.
items.title_zh: 七名厄立特里亚球员在国际比赛结束后未能回国
items.summary_zh: 过去有几名足球运动员潜逃，留下了权利组织所称的专制政府。

items.title: In Paris’s Catacombs, Can a Restoration Breathe New Life Into City’s Dead?
items.summary: For centuries, the bones of some six million people were buried in the catacombs beneath the city. Curators are trying to preserve and modernize the tunnels while maintaining the spooky ambience.
items.title_zh: 巴黎地下墓穴的修复能否为这座城市的死者带来新的生命？
items.summary_zh: 几个世纪以来，大约六百万人的尸骨被埋在城市地下的墓穴中。策展人正在努力保护隧道并使之现代化，同时保持怪异的氛围。

items.title: Epstein in Paris: How a Sex Offender Hustled for Access to France’s Elite
items.summary: Jeffrey Epstein spent his last days of freedom in Paris, meeting with influential figures. It was a playbook he used everywhere he lived to stamp a veneer of respectability on a life of sordid criminality.
items.title_zh: 爱泼斯坦在巴黎：一名性犯罪者如何努力接触法国精英
items.summary_zh: 杰弗里·爱泼斯坦在巴黎度过了他自由的最后几天，会见了有影响力的人物。这是他在所生活的任何地方都使用的剧本，为肮脏的犯罪生活打上体面的外衣。

items.title: Trump’s Board of Peace Gives Hamas Disarmament Deadline
items.summary: The demand reflects both the U.S. administration’s eagerness to secure a lasting cease-fire in Gaza and its growing impatience with the Palestinian militant group.
items.title_zh: 特朗普和平委员会给哈马斯解除武装的最后期限
items.summary_zh: 这一要求既反映出美国政府渴望确保加沙持久停火，也反映出美国政府对巴勒斯坦激进组织越来越不耐烦。

items.title: XRP slips to $1.31 after failed breakout as liquidity dries up
items.summary: Rejection at $1.35 and collapsing depth raise risk of sharper moves as positioning builds.
items.title_zh: 由于流动性枯竭，XRP 突破失败后跌至 1.31 美元
items.summary_zh: 1.35 美元的拒绝和深度的崩溃增加了随着仓位的建立而出现更剧烈波动的风险。

items.title: SEC close to putting out 'reg crypto' for fundraising questions, Chair Atkins says
items.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission will address fundraising and startup exemptions in this proposal, Paul Atkins told a crowd Monday.
items.title_zh: 阿特金斯主席表示，美国证券交易委员会即将针对筹款问题推出“reg crypto”
items.summary_zh: 保罗·阿特金斯周一对人群表示，美国证券交易委员会将在该提案中解决筹款和初创企业豁免问题。

items.title: Phantom reports temporary service outage affecting in-app balances
items.summary: Phantom is currently experiencing a service outage affecting token prices and balances, but said user funds are safe.
items.title_zh: Phantom 报告临时服务中断影响应用内余额
items.summary_zh: Phantom 目前正经历服务中断，影响了代币价格和余额，但表示用户资金是安全的。

items.title: Top Aave risk manager Chaos Labs exits amid governance dispute
items.summary: Chaos Labs is the latest major Aave contributor to walk away from the project following the departure of BGD Labs and ACI.
items.title_zh: Aave 顶级风险经理 Chaos Labs 因治理纠纷退出
items.summary_zh: Chaos Labs 是继 BGD Labs 和 ACI 离开后最新退出该项目的 Aave 主要贡献者。

items.title: Polymarket unveils plans for trading engine overhaul, native stablecoin
items.summary: “We're upgrading the entire Polymarket exchange stack over the next 2-3 weeks. New contracts. New order book. New collateral token,” Polymarket said.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 公布交易引擎检修计划和原生稳定币
items.summary_zh: “我们将在未来 2-3 周内升级整个 Polymarket 交易所堆栈。新合约。新订单簿。新的抵押代币，”Polymarket 表示。

items.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.
items.title_zh: 智能时代的产业政策
items.summary_zh: 探索我们在人工智能时代雄心勃勃、以人为本的产业政策理念——重点是随着先进智能的发展，扩大机会、共享繁荣，并建立有弹性的机构。

items.title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
items.summary: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.
items.title_zh: Codex 现在为团队提供更灵活的定价
items.summary_zh: Codex 现在包括 ChatGPT 商业版和企业版的即用即付定价，为团队提供更灵活的选择来启动和扩展采用。

items.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
items.summary: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.
items.title_zh: 加速人工智能的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 筹集了 1220 亿美元的新资金，用于在全球范围内扩展前沿人工智能，投资下一代计算，并满足对 ChatGPT、Codex 和企业人工智能不断增长的需求。

items.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
items.summary: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
items.title_zh: 帮助救灾团队将人工智能转化为亚洲各地的行动
items.summary_zh: 亚洲救灾人工智能：与盖茨基金会合作的 OpenAI 研讨会

items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
items.title_zh: STADLER 重塑一家拥有 230 年历史的公司的知识工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 STADLER 如何使用 ChatGPT 来转变知识工作，从而节省 650 名员工的时间并提高工作效率。

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Holo3: Breaking the Computer Use Frontier
items.title_zh: Holo3：打破计算机使用前沿

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Any Custom Frontend with Gradio's Backend
items.title_zh: 任何带有 Gradio 后端的自定义前端

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: TRL v1.0: Post-Training Library Built to Move with the Field
items.title_zh: TRL v1.0：专为随场移动而构建的训练后库

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。
